title: Blueprint — Heat Pump Reversing Valve
voice_suffix: deep measured baritone, unhurried authoritative systems walk-through, synthetic presenter only

shots.speech_text: Your heat pump heats and cools from one outdoor box. The part that flips the whole cycle lives inside this valve — and most homeowners have never seen it.

shots.speech_text: A four-way valve routes hot refrigerant gas either to the indoor coil for heat, or to the outdoor coil for cooling. A slide piston inside the body swaps those paths in milliseconds.
